items.title: Sources: The Utah Jazz plan to sign Tamar Bates to a two-way deal. He was sidelined with a foot injury as a two-way rookie for the Nuggets after averaging 19.5 points on 55% overall and 44% from 3-point range, 4.4 boards, 2.3 assists, and 1.5 steals in the G League last season.

items.title: If Jose Alvarado's new deal starts at the same $4.5M PO he's declining, and includes 8% raises, it should look like this:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
If Jose Alvarado's new deal starts at the same $4.5M PO he's declining, and includes 8% raises, it should look like this:
26-27: $4.5M
27-28: $4.9M
28-29: $5.2M

Doesn't really change the projection much for the tax or aprons. Somewhere around $14M under the second apron with five open roster spots.

items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: NEWS: The Sixers are signing Duke Miles to an Exhibit 10 contract, source tells @phillyvoice.com. An E10 deal is a training camp contract which gives the player a signing bonus if they are waived and report to that team's affiliate in the G League. Vandy On SI reported earlier today.

items.title: 13 players were drafted in 2025 outside of the lottery and cleared 1000 minutes as rookies
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
13 players were drafted in 2025 outside of the lottery and cleared 1000 minutes as rookies

The only one of those 13 players that did so for a playoff team was Hugo Gonzalez, who played for a team that blew a 3-1 lead in the East quarterfinals
